expectations.text: Uses ai.chats.create(...) + chat.sendMessage(...) to keep image context across turns
Passes the uploaded image as an inlineData part (base64 mimeType+data) or Files API
States reference-image limit: up to 14 total (Flash up to 10 objects + 4 characters)
expectations.evidence: Says 'up to 3 reference images for best results' — the legacy 2.5 limit, not 14

expectations.text: Uses a correct GA model id (gemini-3.1-flash-image or gemini-3-pro-image), no -preview suffix
